Title: Apply For Scholarship/Awards
Scenario: Student submits a complete MCM scholarship application with valid details
Preconditions: Student logged in; MCM award window open; student meets eligibility
Input/Action: POST /student/submit/mcm/ with award_id, income_certificate, all MCM fields

Title: Apply For Scholarship/Awards
Scenario: Student submits extended scholarship application instead of legacy MCM
Preconditions: Student logged in; ExtendedScholarshipType is active
Input/Action: POST /applications/ with scholarship_type, academic_year, semester, documents

Title: Apply For Scholarship/Awards
Scenario: Student submits application with CPI below minimum
Preconditions: Student logged in; CPI below scholarship minimum_cgpa
Input/Action: POST /applications/ with scholarship_type having high minimum_cgpa
Expected Result: Rejected HTTP 400; eligibility error with reasons

Title: Modify Pending Application
Scenario: Student attempts to modify a pending (non-reverted) application
Preconditions: Student logged in; application status=pending
Expected Result: Rejected; can only edit reverted applications

Scenario: Student attempts to update finalized application

Title: Forward Application
Scenario: Assistant tries to forward non-pending application
Preconditions: Assistant logged in; application already verified
Input/Action: PATCH /mcm-applications/<pk>/ with status=verified on verified app
Expected Result: Error; assistant can only act on pending applications

Expected Result: Created; HTTP 201; data returned with new ID
